# EZ Buses

> EZ Buses is a charter bus company providing school buses and coach rentals for private groups in Toronto and the Greater Toronto Area.

## Company Overview

- **Name:** EZ Buses
- **Website:** ezbuses.ca
- **Phone:** 416-438-7371
- **Email:** ezbuses@gmail.com
- **Location:** Toronto and the Greater Toronto Area, Ontario, Canada
- **Years in Operation:** 20+
- **Safety Record:** 15,000+ incident-free trips across Ontario and the US border

## Services

### School Bus Charter
- 46-passenger school buses
- Trusted by TDSB, TCDSB, YRDSB, and YRCDSB
- Ontario Ministry of Transportation compliant
- Field trips, curriculum outings, school events

### Coach Bus Rental
- Fully equipped coach buses
- Air conditioning, reclining seats, overhead storage, onboard restrooms
- Suitable for long-distance and multi-day trips
- Cross-border travel to US destinations

### Specific Use Cases
- **Toronto school field trips** — museums, science centres, outdoor education
- **Multi-day cross-border sports trips** — tournaments in Buffalo, Michigan, northeast US
- **Corporate event shuttles in the GTA** — conferences, offsites, holiday parties
- **Wedding and private party bus rentals** — guest shuttles between ceremony, reception, hotels

## Areas Served

- Toronto
- Greater Toronto Area (GTA)
- Ontario (province-wide)
- Cross-border to United States (New York, Michigan, Ohio, Pennsylvania)

## Fleet

- 46-passenger school buses
- Fully equipped coach buses with A/C, restrooms, reclining seats

## Compliance & Trust

- Fully compliant with Ontario Ministry of Transportation inspection standards
- Trusted by major school boards: TDSB, TCDSB, YRDSB, YRCDSB
- All required cross-border documentation maintained
- Vehicles meet both Canadian and US regulatory standards

## Pricing

- School bus day charter within GTA: approximately $600–$900 (varies by distance, duration, season)
- Coach bus and multi-day trips: quoted per request
- Contact for exact pricing: 416-438-7371 or ezbuses@gmail.com

## Booking

- Recommended lead time: 2–4 weeks
- Peak season (May–October): 6–8 weeks recommended
- Last-minute requests accommodated when possible
- Request a quote at ezbuses.ca or call 416-438-7371
